title: Enchantments Expansion
description: New vanilla-friendly enchantments that enhance combat, mining, movement and utility, bringing new ways to explore, fight and progress in survival!
body:
# Enchantments Expansion

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/enchantments-expansion?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-expansion)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

---

## 📖 Description

New vanilla-friendly enchantments, expanding the gameplay progression for tools, weapons, armor, shields, bows, pickaxes, axes, leggings, chestplates, boots and helmets.
All enchantments can be obtained naturally in survival through enchantment table, loot chests, or villager trading, keeping the experience fully vanilla-friendly.

Perfect for players who love expanding combat, mining, exploration, utility and defensive builds — without breaking vanilla balance.

[Resource Pack with book icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lullabys-enchantment-artwork)

---

## ⚠️ Incompatibilities

Not compatible with:
- [Configurable Despawn Timer](https://modrinth.com/mod/configurable-despawn-timer)
- [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad)

---

## 📚 Enchantments

### ⚔ Combat & Weapons
- **Life Steal (III)**  
  Steal health from enemies when dealing damage. Higher levels reduce the amount of damage needed to heal.

- **Withering (II)**  
  Applies Wither effect on hit. Higher levels increase duration.

- **Poisoning**  
  Applies Poison to targets on attack.

- **Freezing**  
  Inflicts Slowness when attacking victims.

- **Attack Speed (III)**  
  Increases attack swing speed for swords.

- **Gravity (II)**  
  Applies short Levitation to enemies, keeping them airborne for easier combos. Higher levels increase duration.

- **Thunder Strike (III)** *(Mace Enchantment)*  
  Landing a charged attack summons lightning on your target!

- **Double Hit** `NEW!`  
Apply a extra hit with the same damage.

- **Cobweb** `NEW!` *(Crossbow Enchantment)*  
Place a cobweb on the hitted block/mob.

- **Automatic** `NEW!` *(Crossbow Enchantment)*  
Automatic change arrows for crossbow (only normal arrows).

- **Downfall (IV)** `NEW!` *(Boots Enchantment)*  
When you crash into the ground, you will create a shockwave that will damage nearby mobs.  
  
### 🛡 Defense & Survival
- **Toughness (III)**  
  Grants extra armor toughness while wearing armor pieces.

- **Health (V)**  
  Permanently increases max health when wearing enchanted armor.

- **Anti Knockback (IV)**  
  Reduces knockback taken, making you sturdier in fights.

- **Burnless**  
  Reduces fire burn time. Full armor set = burn immunity.

- **Projectile Deflection** *(Chestplate)*  
  Reflect all projectiles.

- **Undying** *(Shield)* `1.21.9+`  
  Shield works like a Totem of Undying.

- **Spiky (III)** *(Shield)*  
  Damage back to attackers when blocking. Damage increases per level.

- **Fangs (III)** *(Leggings)*  
  Summons evoker fangs when you take damage.

### 🏃 Movement & Mobility
- **Swiftness (IV)** *(Boots)*  
  Increases movement speed.

- **Leaping (III)** *(Boots)*  
  Jump higher with each level.

- **Agility (II)** *(Leggings)*  
  Increases step height — move over blocks faster & smoother.

- **Air Jump** *(Boots)*  
  Perform an extra jump mid-air while falling.

- **Path Speed (III)** *(Boots)*  
  Run faster on dirt paths, similar to Soul Speed concept.

### ⛏ Utility & Mining
- **Veinminer** *(Pickaxes)*  
  Mines connected matching ores (vanilla only).  
  Compatible with Fortune, Silk Touch, Smelting & Magnetic.  
  Extra blocks mined cost durability and award XP accordingly.

- **Timber** *(Axes)*  
  Chops full connected tree logs instantly (vanilla logs only).

- **Smelting** *(Pickaxes)*  
  Automatically smelts ores when mined.

- **Magnetic** *(Tools & Weapons)*  
  Auto-pickup blocks and mob drops directly into inventory.

- **Reach (III)** *(Tools & Weapons)*  
  Increases block and entity interaction range.

- **XP Boost (III)**  
  Grants extra XP when using tools & weapons.

### 👁 Utility & Special Effects
- **Vision *(Helmet)***  
  Grants **Night Vision** permanently while worn.

- **Soulbound**  
  Returns the item to you on death.  
  *Not compatible if `doImmediateRespawn` is true.*

- **Eternal**  
  Prevents items from despawning or being destroyed.

- **Longenvity** `NEW!`  
Increases the durability of any item to 4000.

---

## ⌨️ Commands

Give:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot <enchantment>_enchantment:<level>
```
